response.justification: The candidate has strong full-stack engineering experience, extensive exposure to cloud platforms (AWS), and relevant work with agentic workflows and MCP protocols, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years focused on production-grade AI systems, vector databases, or RAG architectures, and their AI experience appears incidental rather than core to their career trajectory.
strengths: Proven experience with agentic workflows and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling
Strong cloud infrastructure exposure via AWS CDK and Kubernetes deployments
Demonstrated leadership in mentoring, workshops, and open-source contributions
concerns: No explicit evidence of 8+ years dedicated to AI/ML production systems
Missing clear experience with vector databases or RAG architecture implementation
AI-related work appears scattered across non-core projects rather than as primary focus
